title: juno edomensis
intro: Juno edomensis, also known as the Juno or Edomensis tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is a shrub native to tropical Africa, with its bark and leaves being used in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Juno edomensis include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and limonoids. Health benefits associated with the plant include relief from fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions.
